Description: Set, add, or subtract from the dimensions of the brush.
Title: Modify Dimensions

Options.Label: Width
Options.Description:
Sets the width of the brush to the specified amount, optionally relative to the existing amount when the 'Relative' checkbox is checked.

Example: To add 5 blocks of width to whatever the current width of the brush is, do:

Value = 5
Relative = Checked

Options.Label: Height
Options.Description:
Sets the height of the brush to the specified amount, optionally relative to the existing amount when the 'Relative' checkbox is checked.

Example: To add 5 blocks of height to whatever the current height of the brush is, do:

Value = 5
Relative = Checked
